title: helianthemum × guiraoi
intro: Helianthemum × guiraoi, also known as Rockrose, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family, derived from the cross between Helianthemum nummularium and Helianthemum alpinum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Rockrose include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from muscle and joint pain. Rockrose can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties.
